title: Decide T-Deck 16 MB flash partition layout
description: Why this exists: LilyGO/Meshtastic sources identify the T-Deck as a 16 MB flash board, but the current Zephyr DTS keeps small 1 MB image slots and tiny storage, which may not fit BLE/LVGL/UI firmware or filesystem assets. What needs to be done: define a T-Deck partition layout for bootloader, image slots/OTA, NVS/LittleFS, logs/assets, and factory/debug needs. Acceptance criteria: generated partition map uses the available flash intentionally; image slot sizes are justified by measured firmware sizes; storage needs for UI/assets/config are documented; bootloader/flashing compatibility is verified or split into a hardware smoke blocker.
notes:
Build/review evidence: EC2 Zephyr build passed for west build -p always -b t_deck/esp32s3/procpu lichen/apps/gateway -d build/t_deck_gateway_partitions after applying the T-Deck 16 MiB partition patch to origin/main aa216515. Generated config: CONFIG_FLASH_SIZE=16777216, CONFIG_FLASH_BASE_ADDRESS=0x0, CONFIG_SOC_ESP32S3_WROOM_N16R8=y, CONFIG_ESPTOOLPY_FLASHSIZE_16MB=y, CONFIG_ESPTOOLPY_FLASHSIZE="16MB", CONFIG_LICHEN_HAL=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_LORA=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_RADIO_MODEL_SX126X=y. Generated zephyr.dts: flash0 reg <0x0 0x1000000>, zephyr,code-partition=&slot0_partition, partitions boot 0x0+0x10000, slot0 0x10000+0x400000, slot1 0x410000+0x400000, scratch 0x810000+0x80000, storage 0x890000+0x400000, assets 0xc90000+0x300000, logs 0xf90000+0x70000. Memory/link evidence: FLASH 213996 B / 16776960 B (1.28%), IRAM 51484 B / 329 KiB, DRAM 92552 B / 313 KiB, IROM 110986 B / 16 MiB, DROM 148460 B / 16 MiB; zephyr.bin 209 KiB, zephyr.elf 5.4 MiB. Three final codex review passes found no findings; earlier P1 8 MiB flash0 mismatch and 2MB ESPTOOLPY header default were fixed. EC2 cleanup complete: instance i-0e4773bb866ad4fee terminated, EBS volume vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 returned available, temporary SG sg-06d8d1bfd209013bb and key lichen-tdeck-partitions-20260630141209 deleted. Physical flash/boot validation remains split to child project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.14.1 and blocks closure.
Final review accounting for T-Deck 16 MiB partition change: pass 1 found no DTS/Kconfig correctness issue after the 16 MiB flash fix and only noted that hardware validation should be a real blocking dependency if it gates closure; this was addressed by making project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.14 depend on project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.14.1. Replacement pass 2 found no findings; checked Kconfig.t_deck SOC selection, PROCPU 16 MiB DTS include, APPCPU flash0 DT_SIZE_M(16), both ESPTOOLPY 16MB defconfigs, contiguous partition map ending at 0x01000000, and Beads hardware blocker. Replacement pass 3 found no findings; checked the same board/DTS/defconfig/partition and Beads blocker surface. No P0/P1/P2 findings remain open for this implementation. Bead remains blocked, not closed, until physical T-Deck flash/boot validation child is completed.
